summary.concern: Katie Holmes & Sean Springs — 20 overdue tasks

paragraphs: Overdue climbed to 74 — we need to reverse this today. This is above the 7-day average of 61 — the trend is heading the wrong direction. 22 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 3 tasks should be active but are stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** The oldest overdue task is 11 days past due with 20 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **7 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $12,641 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** The oldest overdue task is 8 days past due with 11 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **4 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**CANDACE - JUSTIN P REFERRAL (CNG2025-522):** 9 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. 2 tasks should be active right now but are stuck — identify and clear the blockers today.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** The oldest overdue task is 12 days past due with 9 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **22 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $24,127 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** The oldest overdue task is 9 days past due with 7 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **5 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Brandy Sexton (CNG2025-508):** 5 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **16 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 3 payment tasks due this week.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** The oldest overdue task is 10 days past due with 5 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **3 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 4 payment tasks due this week.
**Ginger Brown:** 3 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **13 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 4 payment tasks due this week.
**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** Down to 3 overdue — making progress. Keep pushing to close them out today. **3 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.
**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** 2 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **4 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.
**Jeff:** Carrying 20 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.
**Milagros Porturas:** Down to 4 overdue — making progress.

168 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **77 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 55 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$41,107 in payments going out this week** across 26 tasks — make sure funds are available. $25,942 expected in from 3 client payments. Heavy week ahead for Ginger Brown and Stephanie and Marc Felton — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 17. Keep the momentum going.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 20 overdue (oldest: 11d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **7 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 25 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**CANDACE - JUSTIN P REFERRAL (CNG2025-522):** 9 overdue — oldest first. 2 active-blocked — clear the blockers to keep moving.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 5 overdue (oldest: 10d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **3 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 27 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** Down to 3 overdue — good. Close them out today. **3 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 18 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Jeff: Jeff's overdue has been growing over the past few days — now at 20. This needs to turn around today.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** 9 overdue (oldest: 12d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **22 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 28 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** 7 overdue (oldest: 9d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **5 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Milagros Porturas: Milagros Porturas is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 4. Keep the momentum going.
**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** 11 overdue (oldest: 8d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **4 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start.
**Ginger Brown:** 3 overdue — oldest first. **13 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 29 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** 2 overdue — oldest first. **4 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 11 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Knock out the 4 overdue today — each one risks cascading into blocked tasks downstream.
